articles.title: DeMar DeRozan scores season-high 41 points as Kings beat Jazz 116-111
articles.original_title: DeMar DeRozan scores season-high 41 points as Kings beat Jazz 116-111
articles.summary: DeMar DeRozan scored a season-high 41 points and had 11 assists to help the Sacramento Kings hold off the Utah Jazz 116-111 on Sunday night.  DeRozan, who passed Hall of Famer Tim Duncan last week for 18th place on the NBA’s career scoring list, was 11 of 21 from the floor while reaching 40 points for the first time since Feb. 2, 2025.  Precious Achiuwa added 20 points and 11 rebounds in the matchup of the two worst teams in the Western Conference.

articles.title: U.S. beats Dominican Republic 2-1 to reach 3rd straight WBC title game
articles.original_title: U.S. beats Dominican Republic 2-1 to reach 3rd straight WBC title game
articles.summary: Team USA's celebration after beating the Dominican Republic on Sunday night in the World Baseball Classic semifinals was electric and brief.  NL Cy Young award winner Paul Skenes roared “Let's go!” after the final out.  Closer Mason Miller let out a yell and pointed toward the sky.

articles.title: McDavid has 3 assists, Draisaitl injured in the Oilers' 3-1 win over the Predators
articles.original_title: McDavid has 3 assists, Draisaitl injured in the Oilers' 3-1 win over the Predators
articles.summary: EDMONTON, Alberta (AP) — Connor McDavid had three assists, linemate Leon Draisaitl scored, but was injured soon after and the Edmonton Oilers beat the Nashville Predators 3-1 on Sunday to end a two-game losing streak.Draisaitl took a hard early hit from Ozzy Wiesblatt. The Edmonton star came back for a couple of shifts, but didn’t return for the start of the second period.Matthew Savoie and Zach Hyman also scored for Edmonton, and Connor Ingram made 26 saves. articles.title: Kraken beat the Panthers 6-2 to move into the 2nd wild-card spot in the West
articles.original_title: Kraken beat the Panthers 6-2 to move into the 2nd wild-card spot in the West
articles.summary: Bobby McMann had a power-play goal and added an assist in his second game for Seattle, and the Kraken beat the Florida Panthers 6-2 on Sunday night to move into the second wild-card spot in the West.  McMann had two goals and an assist in his Kraken debut Saturday night in a 5-2 victory in Vancouver.  Against Florida, McMann scored his 22nd goal of the season and assisted on Jamie Oleksiak's goal.

articles.title: Knicks rally from a 21-point deficit and beat the short-handed Warriors 110-107
articles.original_title: Knicks rally from a 21-point deficit and beat the short-handed Warriors 110-107
articles.summary: Jalen Brunson had 30 points and nine assists, and the New York Knicks rallied from a 21-point deficit against a patchwork Golden State lineup to beat the Warriors 110-107 on Sunday night.  Karl-Anthony Towns had 17 points and 12 rebounds for the Knicks, while OG Anunoby and Jordan Clarkson both had 14 points.  The Knicks took a while to wake up in their return home from a five-game road trip before eventually picking up their third straight victory.

articles.title: NBA: Missed call late in Lakers-Nuggets thriller
articles.original_title: NBA: Missed call late in Lakers-Nuggets thriller
articles.summary: The NBA ruled that Spencer Jones had a clean strip of Austin Reaves with 9.2 seconds remaining in regulation of Saturday's Nuggets-Lakers game and that Reaves should not have gone to the free throw line.
